title: AFK Shield
description: Stay safe from mobs! Go AFK with full protection and return to the game whenever you like
body:
# AFK Shield

Stay safe from mobs while AFK.


## Screenshots

![AFKPANEL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ea1ddf7cf64fdf7786cbf30d01fdb16c75e3a3b_0.webp)

![Auto-AFK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd6fb767229b08ef8a91ba854bfe10ca036bd08a_0.webp)

![TimeCustomize](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63d8a49b420f74a64abd52ee195d1b59be783b6c_0.webp)



## What is AFK Shield?

A simple AFK plugin that protects you from mobs and damage. When activated, you become invulnerable and invisible to mobs.



## Features

- Ghost Mode Protection
- Complete freeze in place
- Auto-AFK after inactivity
- Customizable timeout
- Simple settings GUI

---

## Commands

`/afk` - Toggle AFK mode

`/afk panel` - Open settings

`/afk help` - Show help

---

## Requirements

- Server: Paper MC 1.13+ (Spigot compatible)
- Java: 8+
- Minecraft: 1.13 - 1.21.1

---

## Installation

1. Download `AFKShield-1.1.0.jar`
2. Put it in your `plugins/` folder
3. Restart your server

---

## How to Use

Type `/afk` to activate AFK mode.

Move to exit AFK mode.

Use `/afk panel` for Auto-AFK settings.


---

## Protection

Protects you from:
- Mob attacks
- Fall damage
- Fire/lava
- Drowning
- PvP
- Being pushed

---

## Support

Need help? Join our Discord:

🔗 https://discord.gg/yeKWz9jabP
